name: BlackJAX (JAX-Based MCMC Sampling Library)

performance.notes: JAX JIT-compiled; GPU/TPU accelerated; orders of magnitude faster than PyMC on GPU

agent_readiness.notes: JAX-based MCMC library with many algorithms. import blackjax. def logdensity_fn(position): return log_prob. sampler = blackjax.nuts(logdensity_fn, step_size=1e-3). initial_state = sampler.init(position). new_state, info = sampler.step(rng_key, initial_state). jax.lax.scan for efficient sampling. Algorithms: NUTS, HMC, MALA, RMHM, SMC, SGLD, variational inference. window_adaptation for step size tuning. Pairs with NumPyro/numpyro's log_density. vmap for parallel chains. Functional API — no hidden state.

gotchas: Functional API requires JAX expertise — no high-level model building
Manual step size tuning or window_adaptation needed
Not a PPL — combine with NumPyro or raw JAX for model definition
Newer library — API may change; NumPyro NUTS is more established
best_when: GPU-accelerated MCMC for large-scale Bayesian inference
Research requiring custom MCMC algorithms in JAX
When parallel chains via vmap are needed for scalability
Sequential Monte Carlo (SMC) for Bayesian filtering
avoid_when: When NumPyro's built-in NUTS is sufficient
CPU-only environments where JAX advantage is minimal
summary: BlackJAX provides JAX-based MCMC algorithms (NUTS, HMC, MALA, SMC). blackjax.nuts(logdensity_fn, step_size). sampler.init(position). sampler.step(rng_key, state). jax.lax.scan for chains. vmap for parallel chains. Apache-2.0. GPU/TPU-accelerated. Functional pure-JAX API — no hidden state. Best for GPU-accelerated Bayesian inference when JAX infrastructure is available. Not a PPL — define models with NumPyro or raw JAX.
